notes: The skill consistently ensures structural completeness — roles section, entry points, state transitions, and terminal states are reliably included.
Without the skill, audio-guestbook scored worst (5/9) — missing roles section, entry points, state transitions, terminal states, and navigation-first user stories.
The favorites eval was closest (9/9 vs 8/9) — CLAUDE.md already has strong conventions that the model followed without the skill.
Time and token usage are roughly equivalent — the skill adds no overhead.
